title: Deterministic Telegram-origin restart routing in boot completion flow
summary: Ensure post-restart completion notifications route back to the true originating Telegram context (including chat/user identity) instead of ambiguously falling back to startup session defaults.

affectedFiles.description: Add optional Telegram context fields to RestartContext and persist telegramChatId/telegramUserId in contextToPersist.
Import SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM, resolve deterministic session/channel/origin defaults, and restore Telegram identity fields before post-restart routing log/context set.

diffPreview:
- RestartContext adds previousTelegramChatId?: string and previousTelegramUserId?: number
- restart context persistence includes sessionContext?.telegramChatId and sessionContext?.telegramUserId
- boot routing removes telegram-special hardcoded boot-startup branch in favor of resolvedChannel/resolvedOrigin/resolvedSessionId
- telegram post-restart context restoration explicitly sets telegramChatId/telegramUserId and normalizes origin to SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM
estimatedImpact: Eliminates wrong-channel restart confirmations for Telegram-origin restarts; improves deterministic routing and operator confidence with minimal scoped risk.
executorPrompt: Apply the approved patch exactly as specified in the proposal details for src/gateway/lifecycle.ts and src/gateway/boot.ts, preserving exact find/replace blocks. After edits, run npm run build and report results. If build fails, provide the exact error and stop for review.
